Event: Cornucopia Island July 2025
Event Date: 25/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A237
There and Back artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Crippling Throw
The artifact owner flies into a rage. They increase in size, and their stats are increased by 20% for 5 sec. They also throw a shuriken at a random enemy unit every second for the duration. The shuriken bounces up to 3 times. On hit, the shuriken deals 250000 physical damage to the target and applies exhaustion to them. Exhausted enemy unit takes physical damage equal to 100% of the artifact owner's attack every second. While exhaustion is active, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 20%. The exhaustion lasts 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The shuriken also has a 50% chance to remove the target's armor for 3 sec. The unit whose armor has been removed loses 45% armor stats and can't use armor abilities.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
